memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 CurveType, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenKey

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params from the IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Is a type of elliptic curve
Lower 32 bit address of the static private key
Higher 32 bit address of the static private key
Lower 32 bit address of the public key to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the public key to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic key generation is successful
XSECURE_ELLIPTIC_NON_SUPPORTED_CRV - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - On failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticGenSign

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params of the XSECURE_API_ELLIPTIC_GENERATE_SIGN IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticGenerateSignature server API.

parameterdescription.para: Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignGenParams structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignGenParams structure
Lower 32 bit address of the signature to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the signature to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic sign generation is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 CurveType, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_EllipticValidatePubKey

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params of XSECURE_API_ELLIPTIC_VALIDATE_KEY IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticValidateKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Is a type of elliptic curve
Lower 32 bit address of the public key
Higher 32 bit address of the public key

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic key validation is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params with respect to XSECURE_API_ELLIPTIC_VERIFY_SIGN IPI command and calls XSecure_EllipticGenerateKey server API.

parameterdescription.para: Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignVerifyParams structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_EllipticSignVerifyParams structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the elliptic sign verify is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If curve size is 0
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure
Verify the signature for the provided hash, key and curve type

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If Cmd is NULL or API ID is invalid
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Call the respective API handler according to API ID
XSecure_EllipticGenKey
XSecure_EllipticGenSign
XSecure_EllipticValidatePubKey
XSecure_EllipticVerifySignature

briefdescription.para: This file contains the Xilsecure elliptic IPI handlers implementation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kal 03/23/2021 Initial release 4.6 gm 07/16/2021 Added support for 64-bit address rb 08/11/2021 Fix compilation warnings 4.7 kpt 03/18/2022 Replaced XPlmi_Dmaxfr with XPlmi_MemCpy64 5.0 kpt 07/24/2022 Moved XSecure_EllipticExecuteKat in to xsecure_kat_plat_ipihandler.c 5.1 yog 05/03/2023 Fixed MISRA C violation of Rule 10.3 5.2 yog 06/07/2023 Added support for P-256 Curve yog 08/07/2023 Removed trng init call in XSecure_EllipticIpiHandler API since trng is being initialised in server API's am 08/17/2023 Replaced curve size check with XSecure_EllipticGetCrvSize() call ng 02/12/2024 optimised u8 vars to u32 for size reduction 5.3 kpt 03/22/2024 Fix MISRA C violation of Rule 10.3 kpt 03/22/2024 Fixed Branch past initialization ss 04/05/2024 Fixed doxygen warnings 5.4 yog 04/29/2024 Fixed doxygen warnings. 5.6 obs 08/26/2025 Added support for Verifying Address Range
